event: Beach at Trouville at low tide
description: A vast beach stretches across the foreground at low tide, the wet sand reflecting the muted light of the sky. Dark patches of exposed rock or seaweed dot the shoreline. In the far distance, a tiny ship or figure is barely visible on the horizon. Above, towering clouds in cream and golden tones billow across a wide sky tinged with pink near the horizon. The overall palette is warm browns, golds, and muted grays.

_meta.title: The Beach at Trouville at Low Tide
